name: p613-estimator-backend
description: SKSK ProTech estimation and diagnostics engine

scripts.build: npm run install-rust && node scripts/build_router_v11.js && npm run build-rust
scripts.install-rust: if ! command -v cargo 2>/dev/null; then echo Installing Rust... && curl --proto =https --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y; fi && export PATH=$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH
scripts.build-rust: export PATH=$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH && if command -v cargo 2>/dev/null; then cd tools/lemon_scraper && cargo build --release; else echo Cargo not found; fi

author: Brian Shaffer
